ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved by the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer who owns the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy (e.g., Personal Auto, Corporate Auto) */,
  "monthly_premium_auto" REAL /* Monthly premium amount for the auto insurance policy */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the policy */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., liability, collision, comprehensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy associated with the claim */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount claimed by the customer */,
  "open_complaints" TEXT /* Number of open complaints associated with the policy */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjuster assigned to the claim */,
  "damage_description" TEXT /* Description of the damage or loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_lifetime_value" (
  "clv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CLV record */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer for whom CLV is calculated */,
  "customer_lifetime_value" REAL /* Calculated Customer Lifetime Value for the customer */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the CLV was calculated */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the CLV (e.g., formula, algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_lifetime_value_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class (e.g., Four-Door Car, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_vehicle_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy this mapping belongs to */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle class associated with the policy */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date the policy-vehicle mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_vehicle_mapping_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_vehicle_mapping_vehicle_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the employee */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., administrator, claims adjuster, customer service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
